extension.summary: Generate AI subtitles via Subtitle Nexus
extension.description: Subtitle Nexus generates AI subtitles for your local video files via subtitlenexus.com. The add-on checks the Nexus community cache first (free), and offers an on-demand transcription option when no cached subs exist. Useful for any non-English audio you want subtitled.
extension.disclaimer: Requires a Subtitle Nexus API key (free signup at subtitlenexus.com). Transcription consumes Nexus tokens or daily credits.
extension.news: v0.1.0 (2026-05-22) - Initial release. Subtitle provider, context menu, and script entry points. - Cache lookup via /v1/subtitle/search/ and on-demand transcription pipeline (audio extract -> upload -> request -> poll -> download SRT).
